name: When Bots Join the Team: Bot Adoption and the Institutional Fabric of Open-Source Software Projects
summary: arXiv:2607.13679v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents are joining human teams, raising a basic question: when an automated agent becomes a regular participant, does group organization strengthe...
description: arXiv:2607.13679v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents are joining human teams, raising a basic question: when an automated agent becomes a regular participant, does group organization strengthen or weaken? We study this question in open-source software, where bots open pull requests, review code, and merge changes alongside people, leaving a public record of every interaction. Treating bots...
author: Yongren Shi, Wenyi Gong
